title: Undead King returns its Limited Summons to cemetery

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, you may summon a creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon. Limited Summon(s) return to the cemetery if this card leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Undead King returns its Limited Summons to cemetery
plan.summary: Seed a source-anchored Limited Summon and verify Undead King source invalidation returns it to the cemetery.

notes: Place Undead King on player_1 field as primary.
Create a source-anchored Limited Summon from player_1 cemetery.
Limited Summons return to the cemetery if Undead King leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.

steps: Return linked Limited Summon(s) to cemetery.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Source-anchored Undead Knight left the field

manualVerification: Verify against card text: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, you may summon a creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon. Limited Summon(s) return to the cemetery if this card leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_004_undead_king-004-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
